title: UK House Price Index for November 2024
body: "The November data shows:   on average, house prices have fallen by 0.4% since October 2024 there has been an annual price rise of 3.3% which makes the average property in the UK valued at £290,000   England  In England the November data shows, on average, house prices have fallen by 0.4% since October 2024. The annual price rise of 3% takes the average property value to £306,000.  The regional data for England indicates that:   the North East experienced the most significant monthly increase with a movement of 1.1% the South West saw the greatest monthly price fall, with a fall of -1.8% the North East experienced the greatest annual price rise, up by 5.9% London saw the lowest annual price growth, with a rise of -0.1%   Price change by region for England     Region Average price November 2024 Annual change % since November 2023 Monthly change % since October 2024     East Midlands £249,000 2.7 -0.4   East of England £340,000 2 -0.1   London £511,000 -0.1 -1   North East £169,000 5.9 1.1   North West £227,000 5.7 0.6   South East £378,000 1.4 -0.7   South West £318,000 2.2 -0.8   West Midlands £255,000 3.7 0   Yorkshire and the Humber £218,000 5.7 0.8     Repossession sales by volume for England  The lowest number of repossession sales in September 2024 was in East of England.  The highest number of repossession sales in September 2024 was in the North East.     Repossession sales September 2024     East Midlands 3   East of England 1   London 9   North East 12   North West 9   South East 5   South West 3   West Midlands 6   Yorkshire and the Humber 2   England 50     Average price by property type for England     Property type November 2024 November 2023 Difference %     Detached £460,000 £456,000 0.8   Semi-detached £298,000 £286,000 4.1   Terraced £257,000 £246,000 4.5   Flat/maisonette £253,000 £249,000 1.6   All £306,000 £298,000 3     Funding and buyer status for England     Transaction type Average price November 2024 Annual price change % since November 2023 Monthly price change % since October 2024     Cash £287,000 2.2 -0.6   Mortgage £317,000 3.3 -0.3   First-time buyer £259,000 4.1 0.1   Former owner occupier £345,000 1.8 -0.9     Building status for England     Building status* Average price September 2024 Annual price change % since September 2023 Monthly price change % since August 2024     New build £450,000 25.3 -0.1   Existing resold property £303,000 1.2 -0.3     *Figures for the 2 most recent months are not being published because there are not enough new build transactions to give a meaningful result.  London  London shows, on average, house prices decreased by 1% since October 2024. An annual price fall of 0.1% takes the average property value to £511,000.
